# JEEnie AI

> AI-powered personalized learning platform for JEE Main, JEE Advanced, NEET, and Foundation (Class 9-10) exam preparation in India. 50,000+ practice questions with adaptive difficulty, smart analytics, AI doubt solver, and gamified learning.

## What JEEnie AI does

JEEnie AI helps Indian students crack competitive entrance exams through:
- **Adaptive practice**: questions auto-adjust to your skill level
- **AI Doubt Solver**: step-by-step Hinglish explanations
- **Personalized study plans**: AI analyzes your weak topics and builds a daily plan
- **Mock tests**: full-length JEE/NEET pattern tests with detailed analytics
- **Topic mastery tracking**: see exactly which chapters need more work
- **Gamification**: streaks, badges, leaderboards to maintain consistency

## Exams covered
- JEE Main (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics)
- JEE Advanced (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics)
- NEET (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
- Foundation Class 9-10 (board exam preparation)

## Pricing
- Free tier: 15 questions/day, 2 mock tests/month
- Pro: ₹99/month — unlimited questions and tests, AI features
- Pro+: educator PPTs and premium content library

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.jeenie.website/): platform overview
- [Why Us](https://www.jeenie.website/why-us): differentiators vs traditional coaching
- [About](https://www.jeenie.website/about): team and mission
- [FAQ](https://www.jeenie.website/faq): common questions about JEE/NEET prep
- [Subscription Plans](https://www.jeenie.website/subscription-plans): pricing details
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.jeenie.website/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://www.jeenie.website/terms-of-service)

## Common questions

**Is JEEnie AI free?** Yes, a free tier is available. Premium starts at ₹99/month.

**Which exams does it cover?** JEE Main, JEE Advanced, NEET, Foundation 9-10.

**How does AI personalization work?** JEEnie AI tracks attempts, accuracy, time-per-question, and topic mastery to dynamically adjust difficulty and recommend the next best topic to study.

**Does it work on mobile?** Yes — installable PWA on Android/iOS plus native apps.

- Website: https://www.jeenie.website
